question:
[Previous Feedback] The Markdown file is correctly named.

[Previous feedback] {feedback}

Regarding our file naming convention YYYYMMDD_snake_case.ext, which of the following statements are correct?

A. The date prefix allows files to be automatically sorted by creation date
B. Using hyphens (-) instead of underscores (_) is also acceptable
C. snake_case requires the description to be all lowercase with words separated by underscores
D. The date in the file name must match the actual creation date
E. The file extension (e.g. .json, .md) case does not affect compliance
F. The description part can include numbers, e.g. 20260323_v2_report.json

Answer using \bbox{X,Y,...} format.
